titleStmt.title: SII 27.396: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 396. (A.R. No. 280 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab lying in Puṭṭaṇṇayya's garden at Chauḷikēri.
This badly damaged record registers a gift of land and money to god Gōpīnāthadēva. The details of the grant are all lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ mattaṁ kōṭiyavoḷage mūlada bāḷa catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍu
(ḍu)valu teṁkalu heddāriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudrada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu gilāgiyagaḍi
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī satussīmeyiṁda voḷaguḷa bāḷu bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu 3 muḍi gade�yo
bāḷige vuḷa mane maneṭhāu keṟe sahita bāḷi bāḷunāthadēvarige dēvasva kāṭiga 1 �yo bāḷige gēṇi
sahita prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ Akkiya mū 30 baḷiyavoḷage beṁgereya mūlada bāḷa catusīmeya vivara
mūḍalu maṇigāṟa kēriya bācaṇa hoḷarana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Arasakka seṭṭitiya gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudradiṁda mūḍalu ya mādaṇa seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁ
da voḷagaṇa bāḷu teṟu saha prativaruṣa 1 kkeThe rest of the record is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 27.396 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
